subject: A large crocodilian humanoid wearing a fedora and suit jacket crawls through shallow water or mist
description: A bulky, reptilian humanoid figure with clearly crocodilian features — scaled green-gray skin, a wide flat snout, clawed hands — crawls or leans forward through a shallow flooded surface or dense mist. The figure wears a wide-brimmed fedora hat and a loose suit jacket, both weathered and damp. A scaly crest or ridged tail is visible behind the figure. Tendrils of red energy or blood-red liquid swirl around the figure's feet or hands in the water. The overall palette is muted gray-greens and dark tones, with the red tendrils providing the only vivid color accent. The atmosphere is grim and hunted, as if the figure is stalking or navigating through difficult terrain undercover. The design is a literal 'crocodile-elf hybrid in a detective coat' — a playful but committed noir mashup creature.
foreground: crocodilian humanoid in fedora crawling through mist or shallow water with red energy tendrils
background: misty gray void or flooded surface
emotion: focused predatory advance — low to the ground, determined
